question: Where does Arjun currently live?
contexts: Arjun Sharma is a 28-year-old software engineer who moved to Bangalore in 2021.
He lives in the Koramangala neighbourhood of Bangalore, Karnataka.
Arjun previously lived in Jaipur, Rajasthan, where he grew up.
He works at a tech startup in the Indiranagar area of Bangalore.
Arjun has a golden retriever named Mango and enjoys playing badminton on weekends.
ground_truth: Arjun currently lives in Koramangala, Bangalore, Karnataka.

question: How much does the AeroBook Pro weigh?
contexts: The AeroBook Pro is a premium ultrabook launched in March 2024, priced starting at $1,299.
It weighs only 1.1 kg thanks to its magnesium-alloy chassis, making it one of the lightest laptops in its class.
The display is a 13.6-inch OLED panel with 2.8K resolution and 120 Hz refresh rate.
It is powered by an Intel Core Ultra 7 processor with 16 GB LPDDR5 RAM and 512 GB NVMe SSD.
The battery capacity is 65 Wh and provides up to 18 hours of battery life on a single charge.
ground_truth: The AeroBook Pro weighs 1.1 kg due to its magnesium-alloy chassis.
